text.title: star-interview-method Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for star-interview-method as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Live-coaching prompts sent to candidates during a real interview.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Coaching a candidate mid-interview is equivalent to fraud — it eliminates the comparative basis for the evaluation and creates legal exposure.
